narrative:
Martins Ferry City has 3,746 registered voters, with 68.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.3 percentage points.
